base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of hud — a ui (hud_readout) from 1993 doom. DOOM HUD — Doomguy face (5 health-states + mugshot animations) + ammo + health + armor + keys. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: DOOM HUD — Doomguy face (5 health-states + mugshot animations) + ammo + health + armor + keys
